boat.full_description:
North East coast one design, designed by Alan buchanan.  
She was Built in 1963 by John Swinburne Shipyard.
 A development from the Coronation Dayboat built by Tucker Brown, Burnham-on-Crouch, They were built to be raced at the south shields yacht club. Dipper is no 4 of 7 built there. Others are known to have been built by King's at Pin Mill.
She has been in our family since 1976, and is mostly original and structurally sound.
boat.name: Dipper
boat.short_description: Varnished clinker built yacht, built 1963. Same family ownership since 1976.
